_meta.method: Aggregated from Sōtōshū Europe (sotozen.com), Unione Buddhista Italiana (UBI) complete center list, AZI Italia network as catalogued by Mokusho Torino, Stella del Mattino community pages, Zenshinji Scaramuccia affiliated centers list, Monastero Enso-ji Il Cerchio centri page, Plum Village Essere Pace, Sanbō Dojo Roma, and CESNUR survey of Italian Zen schools.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Strong coverage of registered/UBI-recognised temples (Sōtō Sōtōshū-listed, AZI/Deshimaru, Scaramuccia/Rinzai, Il Cerchio/Harada-Yasutani-Tetsugen) and the principal Plum Village umbrella. Smaller informal Plum Village/Essere Pace sanghas under-listed because that directory is map-only and not crawlable.
knownGaps: Plum Village / Essere Pace / Interessere local lay sanghas are administered via a JS map and could not be enumerated; only the Milan umbrella organisation is included.
Kwan Um School of Zen has no listed Italian center (kwanumeurope.org filter returns none as of 2026-05).
White Plum Asanga public membership list shows no Italian member centers.

Some AZI groups (Ciampino, Montorio Romano, Ancona, Vicenza, Marebbe, Robbiate, Moglia, San Sperate, Savigliano) had no public website at the time of collection and were dropped from this file because the schema requires a non-empty url.
Yume Zen Trento could not be verified online (the Trento 'Yume' results refer to a sushi restaurant); excluded.
Centro Studi Bodhidharma / Musangam is Korean Chogye Seon (Mahayana) — included as a Korean Zen lineage entry.
Sanbō Zen International member status of the Roma Sanbō Dojo is not publicly listed; the dojo describes itself in the Deshimaru/AZI line, so it is filed under Sōtō / Deshimaru.

places.name: Centro Zen Anshin – Pace del Cuore
places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered temple in Italy. Resident teacher Rev. Doryu Cappelli. UBI member.

places.name: Tempio Buddhista Zen Jōhōji
places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered. Associazione Buddhista Zen Soto Buppo, Rev. Sengyo Van Leuven. AZI Italia.

places.name: Centro Zen Firenze – Tempio Shinnyo-ji
places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered. Resident teacher Rev. Shinnyo Marradi. UBI member.

places.name: Enkuji – Il Cerchio Vuoto
places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered. Resident teacher Rev. Seishin Viviani. UBI member.

places.name: Monastero Zen Enso-ji Il Cerchio
places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered as Ensoji. Founder/abbot Carlo Tetsugen Serra. UBI member.

places.name: Istituto Italiano Zen Sōtō Shōbōzan Fudenji
places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered residential monastery, founded by Fausto Taiten Guareschi. UBI member.

places.name: San-shin Zen Center
places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered. Resident teacher Rev. Myosen Rovesti. No standalone website; entry points to Sōtōshū directory.

places.notes: Sōtōshū-registered mountain hermitage of Enso-ji Il Cerchio.

places.name: Associazione Essere Pace
places.notes: Founded 1996; Italian umbrella for Plum Village / Order of Interbeing sanghas; coordinates retreats and the Italian sangha map.

places.name: Comunità italiana dell'Interessere
places.notes: Italian-language Plum Village hub; maintains national directory of practice groups.

places.name: Musangam – Eremo Bodhidharma
places.notes: Korean Chogye-affiliated Zen/Seon hermitage in Lerici (La Spezia); maintains relations with Songgwangsa (Korea) and Sheng Jue Si (Taiwan).
